title: User Registration & Authentication

registration_flow: START: User submits registration form (username, mobileNo, email, address, pinCode, password, confirmPassword)
[No]  → status = 'Password not matching!' → forward to register.jsp?message=status → END
[Yes] → create UserBean(userName, mobileNo, emailId, address, pinCode, password)
→ DBUtil.provideConnection() → SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=?
DECISION: email already exists in DB?
→ PreparedStatement: INSERT INTO user VALUES(email, name, mobile, address, pincode, password)
login_flow: START: User submits login form (username, password, usertype)
→ SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=? AND password=?
[No]  → return 'Login Denied! Incorrect Username or Password'
→ SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=? AND password=?
→ build UserBean(name, mobile, email, address, pinCode, password) from ResultSet

method_signatures: UserServiceImpl.registerUser(String userName, Long mobileNo, String emailId, String address, int pinCode, String password): String
UserServiceImpl.isValidCredential(String emailId, String password): String — 'valid' | 'Login Denied!...' | 'Error:...'
UserServiceImpl.getUserDetails(String emailId, String password): UserBean | null
key_relationships: UserBean fields: name(String), mobile(Long), email(String), address(String), pinCode(int), password(String)
db_queries: isRegistered: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=?
registerUser: INSERT INTO user VALUES(email, name, mobile, address, pincode, password)
isValidCredential: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=? AND password=?
getUserDetails: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email=? AND password=?

isValidCredential: Login Denied! Incorrect Username or Password

important_notes: Passwords stored and compared as plaintext (no hashing). Direct instantiation of UserServiceImpl in servlets (no DI). DBUtil.closeConnection(ps) called twice after registerUser (likely a bug). getUserDetails does not close connection on success path (early return). Admin credentials hardcoded: admin@gmail.com / admin.
